shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n---FILES---\\n' && rg --files -g '"'!*node_modules*'"' -g '"'!*.lock'"' | head -200 && printf '\\n---STATUS---\\n' && git status --short"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' package.json && printf '\\n--- next config ---\\n' && sed -n '1,200p' next.config.ts && printf '\\n--- app files ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' app/layout.tsx && sed -n '1,220p' app/page.tsx && printf '\\n--- instructions ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' AGENTS.md"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "Next.js request logging console middleware server requests" --json --top-k 5'

/bin/bash -lc "printf '%s\\n' '--- middleware.ts ---' && sed -n '1,120p' middleware.ts && printf '%s\\n' '--- tsconfig diff-ish ---' && sed -n '1,220p' tsconfig.json && printf '%s\\n' '--- files ---' && rg --files -g '"'!node_modules'"' | sort"
